items.name: mosaic-button
items.title: MosaicButton
items.description: Accessible button atom built on @base-ui/react. Variants: default, secondary, ghost, destructive, outline, link. Sizes: default, sm, lg, icon, icon-sm, icon-lg.

items.name: mosaic-navbar
items.title: MosaicNavbar
items.description: Scroll-aware fixed navbar: hide-on-scroll-down, blur backdrop, mobile hamburger menu. Props: logo, links[], cta. No hardcoded branding.

items.name: mosaic-hero-split
items.title: MosaicHeroSplit
items.description: Two-column split hero: copy left, media right. Props: eyebrow, title, subtitle, cta, ctaSecondary, media. Falls back to centered single-column when no media.

items.name: mosaic-feature-centered-media
items.title: MosaicFeatureCenteredMedia
items.description: Centered feature section: heading + body + optional feature grid + centered media slot. Props: title, body, features[], media.

items.name: mosaic-stats-grid
items.title: MosaicStatsGrid
items.description: Border-grid statistics section. Props: stats[] {label, value}, heading, subtext. Values are plain strings; animate at consumer level.

items.name: mosaic-pricing-card
items.title: MosaicPricingCard
items.description: Single pricing tier card. Props: tier, price, features[], cta, highlighted. Compose multiple in a grid for a full pricing section.

items.name: mosaic-logos-grid
items.title: MosaicLogosGrid
items.description: Logo cloud / partner logos grid. Props: logos[] {name, src, width, height}, heading. Grayscale hover effect. Optional stagger-motion variant: pass stagger=true or stagger=80 for CSS keyframe staggered reveal; respects prefers-reduced-motion.

items.name: mosaic-feature-3col
items.title: MosaicFeature3Col
items.description: 3-column feature grid section. Props: heading?, subtext?, features[] {id, title, body, icon?}. Responsive: 1-col mobile, 3-col md+. Icon slot per cell. data-slot API. Distinct from MosaicFeatureCenteredMedia (single centered layout).

items.name: mosaic-testimonials-grid
items.title: MosaicTestimonialsGrid
items.description: Masonry-style testimonials grid: featured item spans half width, rest stack. Props: testimonials[] {id, quote, author, role, avatar?, logo?}, heading.

items.name: mosaic-footer-simple
items.title: MosaicFooterSimple
items.description: Simple multi-column footer. Props: columns[] {id, heading, links[]}, legal, logo?, social[] {label, href, iconSrc?}.

items.name: mosaic-counter
items.title: MosaicCounter
items.description: Animated metric count-up. Counts from 0 to value on mount using requestAnimationFrame (no motion dep). Props: value, duration?, format?. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

items.name: mosaic-theme-toggle
items.title: MosaicThemeToggle
items.description: Light/dark/system theme toggle. Flips data-theme on document.documentElement. Props: themes?, onChange?, label?. Theme-reactive via OKLCH CSS vars.

items.name: mosaic-blurred-orb
items.title: MosaicBlurredOrb
items.description: Decorative blurred gradient orb background. Pure CSS (no extra dep). Props: colors?, size?, position?, blur?, opacity?. aria-hidden. No hardcoded branding.

items.name: mosaic-animated-list
items.title: MosaicAnimatedList
items.description: Staggered reveal list. Children animate in on mount via CSS keyframe + inline animation-delay. Props: stagger?, children, as?. No motion dep. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

items.name: mosaic-integrations-badge
items.title: MosaicIntegrationsBadge
items.description: Integration badge/pill with logo slot + label. Renders as <a> when href provided. Props: label, logo?, href?, target?. OKLCH theme-reactive. No hardcoded branding.

items.name: mosaic-falling-pattern
items.title: MosaicFallingPattern
items.description: Animated dot-grid background pattern (SVG + CSS falling dot animation). Props: density?, color?, animationDuration?. aria-hidden. No extra deps. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

items.name: mosaic-card
items.title: MosaicCard
items.description: Composable card surface: Card + CardHeader + CardTitle + CardDescription + CardContent + CardFooter. Style-only, data-slot per part. OKLCH theme-reactive.

items.name: mosaic-badge
items.title: MosaicBadge
items.description: Inline status badge. cva variants: default, secondary, destructive, outline. Style-only span, data-slot="badge".

items.name: mosaic-avatar
items.title: MosaicAvatar
items.description: Avatar with image + fallback, built on @base-ui/react/avatar. Props: src, alt, fallback. data-slot="avatar".

items.name: mosaic-input
items.title: MosaicInput
items.description: Text input built on @base-ui/react/input. Forwards ref to native input. data-slot="input".

items.name: mosaic-input-group
items.title: MosaicInputGroup
items.description: Composition wrapper laying out prefix/suffix addons around an input. data-slot="input-group".

items.name: mosaic-field
items.title: MosaicField
items.description: Accessible form field built on @base-ui/react/field: Field + Label + Control + Description + Error with wired a11y associations. data-slot="field".

items.name: mosaic-switch
items.title: MosaicSwitch
items.description: Toggle switch built on @base-ui/react/switch. Controlled + uncontrolled, role=switch, keyboard accessible. data-slot="switch".

items.name: mosaic-select
items.title: MosaicSelect
items.description: Listbox select built on @base-ui/react/select. Props: items[], value, onValueChange, placeholder. Keyboard + focus management. data-slot="select".

items.name: mosaic-combobox
items.title: MosaicCombobox
items.description: Filterable combobox built on @base-ui/react/combobox with useFilter. Props: items[], value, onValueChange, placeholder. data-slot="combobox".

items.name: mosaic-dropdown-menu
items.title: MosaicDropdownMenu
items.description: Dropdown menu built on @base-ui/react/menu: Trigger + items + separators. Keyboard nav, focus-visible. data-slot="dropdown-menu".

items.name: mosaic-device-provider
items.title: MosaicDeviceProvider
items.description: Responsive device context provider. Exposes isMobile/isTablet/isDesktop, sm/md/lg/xl breakpoint flags, orientation, viewport size. Hooks: useDevice, useBreakpoint, useIsMobile, useIsTablet, useIsDesktop, useViewport, useOrientation. SSR-safe. Required by all adaptive components.

items.name: mosaic-adaptive-grid
items.title: MosaicAdaptiveGrid
items.description: Device-aware CSS grid wrapper. Reads isMobile/isTablet/isDesktop from MosaicDeviceProvider and applies the correct column count. Props: mobileColumns, tabletColumns, desktopColumns, gap. Uses inline CSS for dynamic columns (no JIT issues).

items.name: mosaic-adaptive-modal
items.title: MosaicAdaptiveModal
items.description: Unified modal/sheet: Dialog on desktop, bottom-sheet on mobile. Uses native <dialog> element (focus trap, Escape key, backdrop). Single API: isOpen, onClose, title, children, description. No Radix/Vaul dep — fully portable.

items.name: mosaic-adaptive-navigation
items.title: MosaicAdaptiveNavigation
items.description: Step navigation: tab strip on desktop, expandable accordion on mobile. Props: items[] {id, title, duration?, isComplete?, children?}, activeItem, onItemChange, expandedItems, onToggleExpanded. Zero debate coupling; generic items API.

items.name: mosaic-dashboard-layout
items.title: MosaicDashboardLayout
items.description: Full-height app shell: sticky header (title, subtitle, breadcrumbs, actions slot), persistent sidebar on desktop, hamburger + AdaptiveModal drawer on mobile. Props: title, subtitle, breadcrumbs[], actions, sidebarProps, renderLink. Zero hardcoded branding.

items.name: mosaic-app-sidebar
items.title: MosaicAppSidebar
items.description: Collapsible sidebar (64px icon-only / 280px expanded) with nested nav, quick actions, recent items, and footer status slot. Full-width on mobile. Props: navItems[], quickActions[], recentItems[], logoSlot, footerStatus. No hardcoded routes or branding.

items.name: mosaic-quick-action-card
items.title: MosaicQuickActionCard
items.description: Grid of action cards with 6 accent color presets (yellow, blue, green, purple, orange, cyan). CSS stagger reveal on mount. Props: actions[] {id, title, description, icon, href, accent?}, heading, columns, renderLink. No hardcoded routes.

items.name: mosaic-activity-feed
items.title: MosaicActivityFeed
items.description: Activity feed card with stagger-reveal rows. Status badges (active/completed/archived), participant avatar stack, message count, timestamp. Props: activities[] {id, type, title, description, timestamp, status, participants?, messages?}, iconMap, viewAllHref, renderLink.

items.name: mosaic-agent-composer
items.title: MosaicAgentComposer
items.description: Responsive-pair agent composer: auto-selects Desktop (2-column with live preview) or Mobile (single-column + sticky CTA) via useDevice. Shared props contract: agentName, customInstructions, 4 module slots (role/persona/framework/model), labels override. Generic MosaicComposerModule type — no domain coupling.

items.name: mosaic-module-card
items.title: MosaicModuleCard
items.description: Selected-module display card for composer slot. Shows name, description, optional details, emoji icon, tags, edit/remove actions. Props: type, module {name, description, details?, icon?, tags?}, onEdit, onRemove, isSelected, isCustom. Generic — no debate domain types.
